title: Industries We Serve
subtitle: Tailored technology solutions for your sector

sectors.name: Transport & Logistics
sectors.shortDescription: Digital transformation for fleet management and compliance
sectors.heroSubtitle: Streamline fleet operations, automate compliance and optimise routes with purpose-built technology
sectors.description: Transport and logistics companies face strict regulatory requirements, operational inefficiencies and rising costs. Paper-based job cards and vehicle inspections cause delays and errors. OBH develops industry-specific digital solutions that eliminate paperwork, automate compliance and give you real-time visibility across your fleet.

features.title: Digital Job Cards & Inspections
features.description: Replace paper-based workflows with secure digital job cards featuring cloud storage and digital signatures

features.title: Fleet Management Tools
features.description: Real-time tracking, maintenance alerts and comprehensive fleet performance dashboards

features.title: AI-Powered Route Optimisation
features.description: Reduce fuel costs and delivery times with intelligent route planning and optimisation

features.title: Compliance & Safety Audits
features.description: Automated compliance reporting and safety audit tools that keep you ahead of regulations

challenges: Strict regulatory requirements and compliance burden
Paper-based job cards causing delays and errors
Rising operational costs and inefficiencies
Lack of real-time fleet visibility

sectors.name: Construction
sectors.shortDescription: Platforms for property transactions, compliance, project management and multi-stakeholder coordination
sectors.heroSubtitle: We build software that connects the people involved in construction and property — from developers and buyers to solicitors and estate agents
sectors.description: The construction and property industry involves multiple parties who all need to work together — developers managing projects and units, buyers going through the purchase journey, solicitors handling legal milestones, estate agents coordinating viewings and sales. We've built platforms that give each stakeholder their own dedicated experience while keeping everything connected through a shared backend — document management, payment processing, legal tracking and real-time communication all in one place.

features.title: Property Transaction Platforms
features.description: End-to-end platforms covering the full property lifecycle — from listings and viewings through reservations, legal processes and completion

features.title: Multi-Stakeholder Portals
features.description: Dedicated interfaces for each party involved — buyers, developers, solicitors, estate agents and administrators — each seeing what's relevant to them

features.title: Document & Legal Process Management
features.description: Structured document handling for contracts, legal files and property records, with milestone tracking and progress visibility across all parties

features.title: Payments & Reservation Systems
features.description: Integrated payment processing for reservations and invoicing, coordinated with the legal and sales workflow

challenges: Multiple parties working from disconnected tools and email chains
No single view of where a property transaction stands
Manual document handling across buyers, solicitors and developers
Payment and reservation processes managed outside the workflow
Lack of visibility for buyers into their purchase journey

sectors.name: Finance & Compliance
sectors.shortDescription: Custom platforms for compliance, verification, investment management and secure document handling
sectors.heroSubtitle: We build software that helps financial services teams streamline compliance, manage verification and simplify complex workflows
sectors.description: Financial services teams deal with heavy compliance requirements, manual document handling and fragmented communication. We've built platforms that digitise onboarding and verification workflows, manage secure document storage, support investment management and keep everything auditable — replacing scattered emails, paper processes and disconnected tools.

features.title: Compliance & Verification Platforms
features.description: Structured workflows for customer onboarding, identity verification, document collection and review — with full audit trails

features.title: Secure Document Management
features.description: Centralised document storage with controlled access, secure sharing and detailed logging of who viewed or downloaded what

features.title: Investment Management Platforms
features.description: Tools for managing investment opportunities, investor onboarding, event coordination and contact management

features.title: Role-Based Access & Data Isolation
features.description: Separate environments and permissions for different user types — ensuring the right people see the right data

challenges: Manual compliance processes with documents scattered across email and messaging apps
Repetitive document collection across different workflows and institutions
Inconsistent processes across teams and account managers
No clear audit trail for document sharing or communication
Complex multi-party workflows with different access requirements

sectors.name: Entertainment
sectors.heroSubtitle: Empower creative businesses with custom digital platforms, ticketing systems and audience engagement tools
sectors.description: The entertainment and creative industries are rapidly evolving, with increasing demand for digital experiences, online ticketing, content management and audience analytics. OBH builds custom digital solutions that help entertainment businesses reach wider audiences, streamline operations and create unforgettable experiences.

features.title: Custom Digital Platforms
features.description: Purpose-built web applications for content delivery, booking and fan engagement

features.title: Ticketing & Booking Systems
features.description: Scalable online ticketing and reservation platforms with payment integration

features.title: Content Management
features.description: Flexible CMS solutions for managing media, events and digital content at scale

features.title: Audience Analytics
features.description: Data-driven insights into audience behaviour, preferences and engagement patterns

challenges: Managing complex digital content workflows
Scaling for peak demand during events
Engaging audiences across multiple channels
Integrating ticketing with existing operations

sectors.name: Education & Training
sectors.shortDescription: Custom platforms for delivering courses, assessments and training online
sectors.heroSubtitle: Custom platforms that help educators deliver courses, assess learners and manage operations more effectively
sectors.description: Off-the-shelf tools rarely fit the way educators actually work. Whether it's delivering live sessions, running assessments or tracking student progress, most platforms force you to work around their limitations. We build custom education software that matches your specific workflow — from live session delivery and digital assessments to student management and results reporting.

features.title: Custom Learning Platforms
features.description: Purpose-built platforms for delivering courses, live sessions and training programmes online — designed around how you actually teach

features.title: Assessment & Results Automation
features.description: Digital assessments with automated scoring, per-topic breakdowns and results tracking — replacing manual marking and spreadsheets

features.title: Live Session Integration
features.description: Embedded video and real-time collaboration tools built directly into the platform, keeping everything in one place for students and educators

features.title: Student & Access Management
features.description: Role-based access control, student onboarding flows and admin dashboards to manage users, permissions and enrolments

challenges: Off-the-shelf tools not fitting specific teaching workflows
Manual assessment and results tracking across spreadsheets
Managing student access and permissions at scale
Transitioning from in-person to hybrid or online delivery
